title: Berserk: The Dark Age Releases Its First Episode
content: With Band of the Hawk fans waiting for Berserk to return with both its manga series and anime adaptation, many Guts enthusiasts are looking for interesting ways to revisit the franchise.
author: ComicBook

title: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, April 13-19
content: The Detective Conan: The Bride of Halloween film aired on NTV on Friday, April 17 at 9:00 p.m. and it earned an 8.3% rating. The Super Mario Bros. Movie aired on Fuji TV on Saturday, April 18 at 9:00 p.m. and earned a 4.9% rating.
author: ANN

title: 5 Years After Finale, Major Crunchyroll Anime Returns With New Streaming Release
content: Five years after the original TV anime series came to an end, a major anime franchise has returned to Crunchyroll with a new streaming surprise that keeps the story going. It’s been a great Spring 2026 anime schedule for the streaming service thus far as fans have gotten to see all kinds of new releases through the…
author: ComicBook

title: Daejeon Secures Approval for Webtoon IP Cluster Project
content: Daejeon Metropolitan City has cleared a key administrative hurdle in its plan to build a large-scale webtoon industry hub, after its Webtoon IP Advanced Cluster Project passed a central government investment review with conditions.
author: ANN

title: The Amazing Digital Circus Finale Banned in The Middle East
content: The Amazing Digital Circus has made a big change for its upcoming series finale, recognizing that there were more than a few fans out there hoping to see the circus’s end on the biggest screen possible.
author: ComicBook

title: FuRyu Reveals Crymelight as New Title in 'Cry' Dark Bishōjo Action Game Series
content: FuRyu revealed during the Indie Live Expo showcase on Sunday that it is developing the CRYMELIGHT game as the latest installment in its CRY series of "dark bishōjo action" game series. The game is a roguelike that will launch on November 5 for PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC via Steam .
author: ANN

title: Fahrenheit 213, Gianty Reveal Lunar Pulse Game
content: Former Fate/Grand Order producer Yōsuke Shiokawa 's Fahrenheit 213 game development studio revealed on Saturday during the Indie Live Expo showcase it and Japan-based developer GIANTY are co-developing a new game titled Lunar Pulse .
author: ANN

title: 'Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu II' Unveils Additional Cast, Ending Theme, First Promo
content: The official website of the Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu ( Skeleton Knight in Another World ) television anime unveiled additional cast, the ending theme, first promo, and a key visual (pictured) for the second season on Saturday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Glacier Bay Books Reveals New Licenses, Updates Status on Acquiring Star Fruit Books' Inventory
content: Glacier Bay Books announced new licenses and upcoming titles, and revealed an update about Star Fruit Books ' inventory on Friday. Glacier Bay Books had announced in February that Star Fruit Books is transferring its publishing line and inventory to Glacier Bay Books .
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Anime's Bonus Episode 'More' Previewed in Trailer
content: TOHO animation began streaming a trailer on Saturday for the My Hero Academia anime's bonus episode , episode 170+1, titled "More." The anime episode will air on May 2. Crunchyroll will stream the anime worldwide, except in Asia.
author: ANN
